texto: However, in this city (San Francisco) that prides itself in being so progressive, it feels like we need to go back and master something both simple as well as incredibly complex – each other. We can learn to embrace our differences without making them a joke or a spectacle.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Crystal Sykes: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a sabedoria. O trecho “However, in this city (San Francisco) that prides itself in being so progressive, it feels like w…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sabedoria, humanity, race-relations pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de race-relations e san-francisco.
